author: yevh
name: SP8192 + Compression-Aware QAT on PR #1493
technique_summary: PR #1493 stack plus compression-aware QAT: entropy surrogate over soft int6 histograms, lambda=0.001, beta=10.0, warmup=200.
blurb: PR #1493 recipe plus a differentiable compression-surrogate loss term during training: mean Shannon entropy of soft-int6 histograms, lambda=0.001, beta=10.0, warmup=200. The submission evaluates whether post-quantization compressibility can be optimized directly during training. It achieves a 3-seed mean val_bpb of 1.10314 with std 0.00009 and max artifact size 15,999,417 bytes.
summary_note: Complete 3-seed submission evaluating compression-aware QAT under the 10-minute / 16MB rules. The compression surrogate decreases monotonically during training across all seeds, but the current implementation has enough per-step overhead to reduce effective training steps and does not improve over PR #1493 on BPB.
